eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City; Elko; Douglas; Churchill; Clark, NV; at 7:07 AM on MAR 19, 2019 Effective until 8:07 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
